title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| Notice Inviting Tender for Mahindra Bolero District Administration West Tripura | Notice Inviting Tender for Mahindra Bolero District Administration West Tripura | 10/03/2025 | 12/03/2025 | |
| On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned invites sealed rate quotations in the plain paper from the interested, experienced and registered bidders/vender for “Supply of Office Visitor’s Chair” under Belbari R.D. Block for Financial Year 2024-25″. The sealed rate quotations should reach to the Office of the Belbari RD Block Belbari R.D. Block, West Tripura latest by 30/01/2025 by 3:00 PM. | On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned invites sealed rate quotations in the plain paper from the interested, experienced and registered bidders/vender for “Supply of Office Visitor’s Chair” under Belbari R.D. Block for Financial Year 2024-25″. The sealed rate quotations should reach to the Office of the Belbari RD Block Belbari R.D. Block, West Tripura latest by 30/01/2025 by 3:00 PM. | 18/01/2025 | 30/01/2025 | |
| On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned invites sealed rate quotations in the plain paper from the interested, experienced and registered bidders/vender for “Supply of “2 KVA SOLAR INVERTER” from CMMV’S scheme under Belbari R.D. Block for Financial Year 2024-25″. The sealed rate quotations should reach to the Office of the Block Development Officer BelbariR.D. Block, West Tripura latest by 30/01/2025 by 3:00 PM. | On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned invites sealed rate quotations in the plain paper from the interested, experienced and registered bidders/vender for “Supply of “2 KVA SOLAR INVERTER” from CMMV’S scheme under Belbari R.D. Block for Financial Year 2024-25″. The sealed rate quotations should reach to the Office of the Block Development Officer BelbariR.D. Block, West Tripura latest by 30/01/2025 by 3:00 PM.
